---
title: "Flaws in reasoning and alignment tax"
subtitle: >
  Lecture 11 lesson plan, {{< var course.code >}}, {{< var course.term >}}
---

1. How different from previous topic
2. Algorithmic idea
    - Foundations
    - Representation
    - Algorithm
3. Historical impact and applications
4. Worked example
    - NLP
    - Graphs
5. Breakout
